backup_info.reason: Creating hybrid approach: Keep custom UI + Use Shopify facets logic

backed_up_files.description: Main section file with filter UI, sort UI, product grid, and load more
JavaScript with FilterPanelDiamension, SortPanelDiamension, CollectionDiamension classes
Complete styling for filters, sort, products, and UI components
Product card snippet used in collection grid

key_features_backed_up: Custom filter panel with slide-in animation
4 filter groups: Categories, Price, Sub-categories, From The Studio
Custom sort panel with 4 sort options
Price range calculation from collection products

known_issues.spelling_variations: Product types and tags have inconsistent spelling (e.g., 'EARRING' vs 'earrings')
known_issues.hardcoded_filters: Filter options are hardcoded in Liquid, not dynamic
known_issues.no_url_updates: Filtering is client-side only, no URL parameters
known_issues.performance: Loads all 250 products upfront for filtering
known_issues.no_seo: Filtered results not crawlable by search engines

test_version_created.approach: Hybrid - Custom UI + Shopify Facets Logic

steps: 1. Copy files from backups/19-060326/filters-feature/ back to original locations
2. Ensure templates/collection.json references the original section
3. Clear theme cache in Shopify admin
restoration_instructions.command: cp -r backups/19-060326/filters-feature/sections/* sections/ && cp -r backups/19-060326/filters-feature/assets/* assets/ && cp -r backups/19-060326/filters-feature/templates/* templates/

notes: Can compare side-by-side: original vs hybrid implementation
Once hybrid is confirmed working, can replace original files
Backup is permanent reference for custom implementation approach
